remaining_issues.problem: 5 dead-code warnings in Rust: add_days, yesterday, label_of, sanitize, copy_dir_recursive. These utility functions are defined in lib.rs but not called from any command. They exist for parity with agent.js date/logic helpers. Consider adding #[allow(dead_code)] or cleaning up.
Backend-only emit 'whatsapp-sync' on window resize/move (lib.rs:1458). Not listened for in frontend. Recommend either adding a frontend listener or removing the emit.
